scripts.sync-types: cp shared/types/index.ts client/src/types/shared.ts && cp shared/types/index.ts server/src/types/shared.ts && cp shared/types/index.ts mobile/types/shared.ts
scripts.dev: npm run sync-types && concurrently "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.dev:mobile: npm run sync-types && npm run start --prefix mobile
scripts.build: npm run sync-types && npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix mobile
scripts.e2e:install: npm install --prefix e2e && npx --prefix e2e playwright install --with-deps chromium
scripts.e2e:dev: npm run sync-types && MONGO_URI=mongodb://localhost:27017/rentos_e2e JWT_SECRET=e2e-test-secret PAYMENTS_PROVIDER_MODE=simulated concurrently "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server"
